title: MP Augulis: PM Siliņa has lost politicians' trust
summary_full: Latvian Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) has lost the trust of both the public and political forces, said Uldis Augulis, deputy chairman of the Union of Greens and Farmers (ZZS) board and member of the Saeima, in an interview on the Latvian Television programme "Morning Panorama" on 13th May.
